name: Kisah Untuk Geri
overview: The story of the twists and turns of love between Geri and Dinda. Dinda's life changed 180º because of her father's corruption, which made her dare to ask Geri, her famous nemesis at school, to be her girlfriend. Geri agrees without realizing that their relationship is the beginning of disaster and the gateway to heartbreak.

trailers.title: Kisah Untuk Geri - Official Trailer I 5 Maret 2021 on  @WeTV Indonesia​
